name: Sarasa Feed
description: Sarasa is the titular novice alchemist. She was orphaned at a young age and aims to be an alchemist just like her late parents. Although she originally had long hair, she cut it short. She is the disciple of the master class alchemist, Ophelia Millis.

name: Sasami Masaki Jurai
description: Sasami is a key character in the Tenchi Muyo! metaseries as well as the protagonist of her own various non-canonical spinoffs. In the Tenchi continuities, Sasami is the younger sister of Ayeka and so is also a princess of the planet Jurai. Within the Masaki extended family, Sasami usually takes on the dual role of younger sister/mother. She may be the most responsible of the group and takes care of all the cooking duties. name: Thirteen
description: Thirteen is a wise, well-mannered person. As a rescue hero, Thirteen has displayed how passionate they are about saving people through their teachings. They even developed their own training facility - the Unforeseen Simulation Joint - to train future heroes in search and rescue tactics. They are very passionate about Quirks, specifically on the topic of using Quirks for creation and assistance rather than for destruction and battle. Thirteen has also been shown to be very brave. name: Ventus
description: Ventus, also known as Ven, is one of the main protagonists in Kingdom Hearts Birth by Sleep and Kingdom Hearts Birth by Sleep Final Mix.
